$comment: Game profiles for DSDeathOverlay. If a game patch breaks one of the pointer
chains below, edit the matching entry and restart the overlay. The 'chainOffsets64'
values are integers (decimal); the first one is the module-relative base offset,
subsequent values are offsets within the dereferenced pointer at each step.
Base offsets are the FIRST array element and must match DSDeaths master hex exactly:
Earlier builds shipped mis-converted decimals (e.g. DS2 0x16244F0, DS3 0x47662B8) that read a null static slot and stuck the overlay on 'load a save'.

games.displayName: Dark Souls II: Scholar of the First Sin
